# Walz Travels

> Walz Travels is a global travel and visa consultancy serving the African diaspora across Canada, United Kingdom, UAE, Nigeria and Ghana.

## About

THE WALZ TRAVELS INC is incorporated in Ontario, Canada. Founded by Olawale Seyi Omobobola. Operating across six international markets.

## Services

- Visa processing: UK, Canada, UAE, Schengen, USA and 190+ destinations
- Flight bookings — IATA registered
- Hotel reservations worldwide
- Private tours: Niagara Falls, London, Dubai, Paris, Dublin
- Travel insurance
- Airport transfers globally
- Jade Connect eSIM — 150+ countries
- AI trip planning via Jade

## Pricing

- UK visa from USD $188
- Canada visa from USD $281
- UAE visa from USD $470
- Schengen visa from USD $231
- USA visa from USD $344

## Markets Served

Canada, United Kingdom, United Arab Emirates, Nigeria, Ghana
